Ulcer Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the current number of unhealed Stage 2 pressure ulcers. 0 Minimum
9 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
^ Blank (skip pattern)
416 M0300B2_STG_2_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM M0300B2_STG_2_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM M0300B2 Stage 2 Pressure Ulcer Present on Admission Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of Stage 2 pressure ulcers that were present on admission/entry or reentry. 0 Minimum
9 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
^ Blank
